/* ----- Rescue tip — amber accent, badge label (mirrors print) ---------- */ .tip.rescue { background: #fff8ee; border-color: #e6c397; border-left-color: #d4900b; } .tip.rescue .contingency-lead { margin: 0 0 4px 0; } .tip.rescue .rescue-heading { display: inline-block; background: #d4900b; color: #ffffff; font-family: "Inter", sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 4px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.04em; margin-right: 4px; } .tip.rescue ul { margin: 4px 0 0; padding-left: 18px; } .tip.rescue li { margin: 2px 0; } /* ----- Time-box .when — solid blue pill (mirrors print) ---------------- */ .time-box .when { display: inline-block; background: #1f5fa8; color: #ffffff; font-family: "Inter", sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 14px; letter-spacing: 0.01em; padding: 3px 9px; border-radius: 4px; margin-right: 8px; margin-bottom: 0; } /* ----- Dark-mode overrides --------------------------------------------- */ @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { .tip.rescue { background: #2a2010; border-color: #4a3a1a; border-left-color: #d4900b; color: #e0e0e0; } .tip.rescue .rescue-heading { background: #d4900b; color: #22303f; } .time-box .when { background: #1e4a8a; color: #ffffff; } }
